recommendations.title: Blind Dating
recommendations.overview: Danny is a blind man who does not let his impairment get in the way of living his life to the fullest, except when it comes to love. Danny's brother sets him up on a series of blind dates, but all of them go disastrously wrong. Just when Danny is abo

recommendations.title: Wrong Turn
recommendations.overview: Chris crashes into a carload of other young people, and the group of stranded motorists is soon lost in the woods of West Virginia, where they're hunted by three cannibalistic mountain men who are grossly disfigured by generations of inbreeding.

recommendations.title: American History X
recommendations.overview: Derek Vineyard is paroled after serving 3 years in prison for killing two African-American men. Through his brother, Danny Vineyard's narration, we learn that before going to prison, Derek was a skinhead and the leader of a violent white supremacist

recommendations.title: Ocean's Eleven
recommendations.overview: Less than 24 hours into his parole, charismatic thief Danny Ocean is already rolling out his next plan: In one night, Danny's hand-picked crew of specialists will attempt to steal more than $150 million from three Las Vegas casinos. But to score the

recommendations.title: Incredibles 2
recommendations.overview: Elastigirl springs into action to save the day, while Mr. Incredible faces his greatest challenge yet – taking care of the problems of his three children.

recommendations.title: The Toll
recommendations.overview: A socially awkward driver and a weary passenger try to make it to their destination while being haunted by a supernatural threat.

recommendations.title: The Corruptor
recommendations.overview: Danny is a young cop partnered with Nick, a seasoned but ethically tainted veteran. As the two try to stop a gang war in Chinatown, Danny relies on Nick but grows increasingly uncomfortable with the way Nick gets things done.

recommendations.title: How to Make a Killing
recommendations.overview: Disowned at birth by his obscenely wealthy family, blue-collar Becket Redfellow will stop at nothing to reclaim his inheritance, no matter how many relatives stand in his way.

recommendations.title: Unleashed
recommendations.overview: Raised as a slave, Danny is used to fighting for his survival. In fact, his "master," Bart, thinks of him as a pet and goes as far as leashing him with a collar so they can make money in fight clubs, where Danny is the main contender. When Bart's cre

recommendations.title: Staten Island Summer
recommendations.overview: Pals Danny and Frank spend the summer after high school working as lifeguards while figuring out their future.
